title: Dammam、Eastern Province — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Dammam、Eastern Province的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Dammam是Eastern Province的一個城市，人口約1,252,000。The capital of the Eastern Province, a major oil industry center and port city on the Arabian Gulf.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
